name: 腾讯电子签
examples_zh: 帮我看看这份租房合同有没有对我不利的条款，我最担心押金和提前退租
帮我草拟一份二手相机买卖协议：A牌相机8000元，当面一手交钱一手交货，验机满意后签字，不退不换
劳动合同期限1年，最多可以约定多长试用期？请给我相关法条原文
examples_en: Review this rental contract for unfavorable terms—I'm worried about deposit and early termination
Draft a used camera sale agreement: 8000 yuan, in-person handover, no returns after signing
What's the maximum probation period for a 1-year labor contract? Show me the legal text
